questions.question: Why do browser APIs like window and localStorage throw errors in SSR?
options: They are blocked by Vue's security policy
They don't exist in the Node.js server environment
SSR serializes all API calls and replays them on the client
They require explicit feature flags to enable in Vite

questions.question: Which lifecycle hook is safe to use browser-only APIs in, and why?
options: setup() — it runs first and has full context
onServerPrefetch() — it runs on the server with full access
onMounted() — it only runs on the client, never on the server
onBeforeCreate() — it runs before the component is rendered

questions.question: What is the advantage of using import.meta.client over typeof window !== 'undefined'?
options: import.meta.client is a build-time flag that tree-shakes dead code, reducing bundle size
typeof window checks cause hydration mismatches
import.meta.client works inside templates while typeof window does not
